items.claim: Damen Penas is a knockout machine with one of the best one-twos in the middleweight division.
items.quote: Knockout machine. one of the best onetwoss outside of maybe Shawn Strickland at middleweight.

items.claim: Damen Penas will likely finish his opponent in the first round due to his opponent being older and slower.
items.quote: Hits like a truck, has a slower, older opponent in front of him and probably puts him out in the first round.

items.claim: Alessandro Costa has averaged 106 points in his last four wins.
items.quote: You look at his last four wins, he's averaging about 106.

items.claim: Max Holloway can score a high volume of points if a fight is extended because he lands a high number of strikes.
items.quote: we know that Max Holloway can score a decent amount of points if the fight gets extended... landing a ton of strikes

items.claim: Cory Sandhagen is unlikely to score many points in a three-round fight.
items.quote: you just know in a three round environment, he's probably not going to score you that many points.

items.claim: Gabe Stevenson has the potential to score over 125 points if he wins within the first minute.
items.quote: Gabe Stevenson, by the way, does have potential to score like over 125 points if he wins inside that first minute which is highly highly likely.
